description: M4 audit finding F2 (issue #441): a struct-constructor field read is checked in any read position, including an assignment's right-hand side. `(point 0 0).z` on the RHS of `:x = …` is `Assign.value`, not an assignment target, so it is checked and raises `ol-unknown-field` (stage semantic); the `:x` place the assignment defines is not itself flagged, so exactly one diagnostic is reported.

diagnostics.message: point has no field z. check the spelling.
